profile.name: Kris
profile.title: Automation & Backend Systems
profile.metaDescription: Automation engineer portfolio focused on Oracle Cloud bot hosting, Discord systems, n8n workflows, GoHighLevel CRM, and API integrations.

hero.eyebrow: Automation Engineer | Oracle Cloud | Discord Bots | n8n | GoHighLevel
hero.title: I build backend systems that remove manual work and keep online businesses moving.
hero.subtitle: I design automations, connect APIs, host Discord bot stacks on Oracle Cloud Ubuntu, and build backend workflows that reduce manual work for e-commerce teams, online communities, and service businesses.

about.title: Backend automation for operators who need speed, reliability, and clean workflows.
about.body: I help businesses connect their tools, automate repetitive tasks, and build systems that can run without constant manual checking. My work is focused on practical execution: Oracle Cloud Ubuntu hosting with systemd services, Discord bot infrastructure, n8n workflow automation, API and webhook integrations, SMS/CRM automations, and deploy tooling that keeps multi-bot stacks in sync.

services.title: n8n Workflow Automation
services.description: Build automated workflows for lead routing, notifications, data syncing, reporting, and internal operations.

services.title: API & Webhook Integrations
services.description: Connect apps together using APIs, webhooks, custom payloads, and backend logic.

services.title: Discord Bot Systems
services.description: Create and maintain Discord bots for announcements, monitoring, slash commands, role workflows, and community operations.

services.title: GoHighLevel Automation
services.description: Set up GHL workflows, SMS/email automations, forms, funnels, pipelines, and customer follow-up systems.

services.title: Oracle Cloud & systemd Hosting
services.description: Deploy bot stacks on Oracle Ubuntu, install mirror-world-style systemd units, configure auto-restart, manage secrets and env vars, and keep production services running.

services.title: Deploy, Sync & Admin Tooling
services.description: Build deploy scripts, manifest verification, SSH workflows, and admin commands so code updates reach the server safely and predictably.

projects.title: Discord Automation Bot Stack
projects.description: Multi-bot Discord setup for community announcements, role-based alerts, slash commands, monitoring channels, and automated operational posting.

projects.title: GHL + SMS Automation Workflow
projects.description: GoHighLevel CRM workflow for opt-ins, customer replies, failed billing follow-ups, Telnyx SMS routing, and segmented staff notifications.

projects.title: n8n API Operations Hub
projects.description: n8n workflows that move data between tools, trigger alerts, clean webhook payloads, and cut down repeated admin work across connected systems.

projects.title: Oracle Cloud Bot Infrastructure
projects.description: Ubuntu deployment stack for running many bots from one repo root: shared Python venv, per-bot systemd services, RSAdminBot sync/deploy commands, manifest checks, and SSH-managed updates.

contact.title: Need a system built or fixed?
contact.body: Send me what you are trying to automate, what tools you use, and where the manual work is slowing you down. I can help map the workflow and build the backend system around it.
